infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Your location is used to advance walking directions at the right time.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is used for obstacle detection.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: The microphone listens for your spoken destination when you set up navigation.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Speech recognition turns what you say into the destination address.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow LAHacks Nav to use the microphone to hear your destination.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow LAHacks Nav to transcribe your spoken destination.
